excerpt: The Speaker (the ناطق, Natiq) and the Guardian of every age function as mubashir and bashir (the bearer of glad tidings) for those who revere them, while serving as munkar and nakir (the inquisitors) for those who deny them.
source_location_hint: Discusses eschatological roles of the Imam in judgment and welcoming/questioning souls

excerpt: When the human acquires righteous deeds and true knowledge, the rational soul is prepared, and both the rational and sensing souls together fashion the luminous form. At death, all three ascend according to their degree of obedience.
source_location_hint: On the tripartite soul and its ascent through planes of reality

excerpt: When Allah raises a believer from the grave, a righteous form emerges with him. This form is an angelic light that perpetually gazes upon every part of his being and ensures all parts develop and attain their station.
source_work: Jamiʿ al-Hikmatayn (The Harmony of Two Wisdoms)
source_location_hint: On the spiritual form and divine protection in the afterlife
